candidates.why: Exact top-line revenue label; equals Net sales in preview and is the clearest total revenue line.
Not revenue; direct cost line.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: Cost component, not revenue.
COGS label, not revenue.
Ancillary revenue, not total company revenue.
Balance sheet liability, not recognized revenue.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total revenue line from candidates.

candidates.why: Exact direct cost / cost of sales label.
Also a valid COGS label, but appears duplicate of Cost of sales.

candidates.row_label: Average number of shares after repurchases (thousands)
candidates.why: Share count, unrelated.

candidates.row_label: Number of shares at end of period after repurchases
candidates.why: Share count, unrelated.

candidates.row_label: Average number of shares after repurchases
candidates.why: Share count, unrelated.

variables.notes: Chose the exact cost of sales line; avoided duplicate alternative label Cost of revenues/COGS.

candidates.why: Core SG&A overhead component.
Core SG&A overhead component.
Looks like subcomponent of Administrative expenses, so less preferred than the broader admin line.
Additional overhead bucket; acceptable when explicit SG&A total is absent.
Contains depreciation, which should be excluded from XSGA when possible.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A total row is present. Selected the best overhead buckets and excluded depreciation-specific and nested subcomponent rows.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization of prior capitalized R&D, not current-period R&D expense.
Balance sheet asset, not income statement R&D expense.
Balance sheet accumulated amortization, not current R&D expense.

variables.notes: No clear current-period R&D expense line exists in the provided statements. Supplemental amortization of capitalized R&D is not XRD.

candidates.why: Broad finance cost line; useful fallback if no cleaner interest-expense line is available.

candidates.row_label: Interest expense on financial liabilities measured at amortised cost
candidates.why: Most specific reported interest expense line and the best match for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest expense on financial liabilities measured at fair value
candidates.why: Interest-related but narrower component, not ideal as primary line.
Interest-related component but not the main borrowing interest expense.
Too broad and includes non-interest items.
Too broad and likely duplicate/empty variant.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Interest component but supplemental and narrower than total borrowing interest.
Semantically ideal generic interest expense label; may be used in some years.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expense on financial liabilities measured at amortised cost

variables.notes: Provided as a priority list: generic interest expense if available, then the main specific interest expense line, then broader financial expenses as fallback.

candidates.why: Valid total equity line, but includes non-controlling interests and risks double counting with MIB.
Entire balance sheet total, not equity.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to Parent Company shareholders

variables.notes: Candidate list misses the preferred owner/parent equity line present in the balance sheet. Selected 'Equity attributable to Parent Company shareholders' from the full preview to exclude non-controlling interests and avoid double counting with MIB. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Balance Sheet] Equity attributable to Parent Company shareholders

candidates.why: Income statement allocation line, but balance sheet NCI is preferred for MIB.
Income statement allocation line, less preferred than balance sheet NCI.
Exact balance sheet non-controlling interests line; best match for MIB.
Equivalent balance sheet label; useful fallback.

variables.notes: Used balance sheet non-controlling interest labels as a priority list.
